parameters.jsCode:
// WHY: We build TWO formats from the same data object: // 1. summaryText → plain text for WhatsApp (no HTML rendering) // 2. summaryHtml → styled HTML table for email // If skipped: Email node would show raw JSON, WhatsApp would break. const d = $json; // Plain text (WhatsApp-safe, uses *bold* markdown supported by WA) const summaryText = [ `📊 *Daily Sales Report — ${d.report_date}*`, `💰 Revenue: ${d.currency} ${d.total_sales}`, `📦 Total Orders: ${d.order_count}`, `🏆 Top Products: ${d.top_products}`, `📋 Order Status: ${d.status_breakdown}` ].join('\n'); // HTML table for email — styled but lightweight const summaryHtml = `

📊 Daily Sales Report — ${d.report_date}

Metric Value
📅 Date ${d.report_date}
💰 Total Revenue ${d.currency} ${d.total_sales}
📦 Total Orders ${d.order_count}
🏆 Top Products ${d.top_products}
📋 Order Status ${d.status_breakdown}

Generated automatically by n8n at ${new Date().toISOString()}

`; return { json: { ...d, summary_text: summaryText, summary_html: summaryHtml } };

parameters.subject: =⚠️ Sales Report FAILED — {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

parameters.content:
# Overview
When 9 AM daily schedule triggers, this workflow fetches WooCommerce orders and sends sales report:

1. Fetch orders from WooCommerce
2. Check for errors
3. Aggregate sales, orders, top products
4. Append to Google Sheets
5. Generate text and HTML summaries
6. Email report to team
7. Send WhatsApp notification

# Node-by-node Purpose

1. Schedule: 9AM Daily
Starts workflow at 9 AM every day

2. Get an order
Fetches orders from WooCommerce

3. IF: WooCommerce Error?
Routes to error email if error exists, else continues

4. Process Sales Data
Aggregates totals, counts, top 5 products, status breakdown for yesterday

5. Update Google Sheet
Appends report row to Sheet1

6. Generate Summary
Creates plain text for WhatsApp and HTML table for email

7. Send Report Email
Emails HTML report to team

8. Send message
Sends WhatsApp notification

9. No Operation, do nothing
Ends successful flow

10. Error Notification Email
Sends failure alert with error details
